title: March's CPVP/Crystal PvP
description: A lightweight, Fabric-based modpack optimized for 1.21.1 Crystal PvP with a focus on maximum FPS and zero input lag. It provides essential combat utilities and visual clarity without any unnecessary bloat.
body:
A streamlined, high-performance modpack designed specifically for the 1.21.1 Crystal PvP meta. This pack strips away the bloat of traditional modpacks, focusing purely on frame stability, low latency, and combat clarity.

⚡ Core Features

Elite Performance: Powered by Sodium, Lithium, and Starlight to ensure maximum FPS even during intense crystal explosions.

Combat Optimization: Includes essential PvP tweaks such as NoHurtCam, Fullbright, and fast-response input handling.

Minimalist HUD: Clean Armor Status, Potion Effects, and Inventory layouts that keep your screen clear for the fight.

Optimized Visuals: Reduced fire height, crystal particles, and explosion debris to maintain visual clarity in the heat of battle.

Low Latency: Network and input optimizations to provide the snappiest experience possible on 1.21 servers.
